<?php /** * GeneralSubtree * * PHP version 5 * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> * @copyright 2016 Jim Wigginton * @license http://www.opensource.org/licenses/mit-license.html MIT License * @link http://phpseclib.sourceforge.net */ namespace phpseclib3\File\ASN1\Maps; use phpseclib3\File\ASN1; /** * GeneralSubtree * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> */ abstract class GeneralSubtree { const MAP = [ 'type' => ASN1::TYPE_SEQUENCE, 'children' => [ 'base' => GeneralName::MAP, 'minimum' => [ 'constant' => 0, 'optional' => true, 'implicit' => true, 'default' => '0' ] + BaseDistance::MAP, 'maximum' => [ 'constant' => 1, 'optional' => true, 'implicit' => true, ] + BaseDistance::MAP ] ]; }
